package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityPerRequestTopkFullSort() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_per_request_topk_full_sort"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag request paths that sort all candidates when heap-based top-k selection would bound work."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
